channel.title: SciML Daily
channel.description: New papers in Scientific ML, AI for Scientific Computing & Applied Math — every morning.

item.title: Epidemiology of Model Collapse: Modeling Synthetic Data Contamination via Bilayer SIR Dynamics
item.description: Uses a bilayer SIR/SIRS mean-field model from epidemiology to analyze LLM training dynamics and model collapse, constituting a mathematical analysis of LLM behavior. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: The Evaluation Blind Spot: A Stereological Theory of Benchmark Coverage for Large Language Models
item.description: Develops a stereological theory for LLM benchmark coverage with Hausdorff distance bounds and dimensionality analysis, contributing applied math to LLM evaluation. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: PyCC.id: A package for hypothesis-driven equation discovery with structural identifiability
item.description: Presents PyCC, a library for hypothesis-driven equation discovery of ODEs from time-series data, directly within scope. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Temporal Preference Concepts and their Functions in a Large Language Model
item.description: Causally localizes temporal preference in LLMs using activation patching and analyzes residual stream geometry, contributing mechanistic interpretability with applied math. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Finite Element-Based Material Learning via Automatic Differentiation: Learning constitutive neural network models from full-field deformation data
item.description: Integrates constitutive neural networks within a differentiable FEM solver using automatic differentiation, a SciML method for material learning. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: A differentiable machine learning small-angle X-ray scattering analysis framework for structure elucidation of lipid nanoparticles
item.description: Uses a machine-learning-accelerated differentiable framework for SAXS inverse problem analysis of lipid nanoparticles. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Multi-Fidelity Learning with Shallow Recurrent Decoders for Reactor Physics
item.description: Applies multi-fidelity learning with shallow recurrent decoders to map low-fidelity to high-fidelity solutions in reactor physics. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: The Score Hamiltonian: Mapping Diffusion Models to Adiabatic Transport
item.description: Maps diffusion models to adiabatic transport via Score Hamiltonians, providing theoretical analysis with applied math for generative models. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: DiffSlack: Learning under Nonlinear Inequality Constraints via Learnable Slack Variables
item.description: Introduces DiffSlack, a differentiable projection layer for nonlinear inequality constraints, applicable to optimization in engineering. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Learning Manifold and It\^o Dynamics with Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations
item.description: Introduces Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations for learning Itô and manifold dynamics, a new method for equation discovery. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Gradient descent at the Edge of Stability: free energy model and kinetic description of the two-layer network
item.description: Mathematical analysis of gradient descent dynamics in two-layer networks with mean-field limit and free energy model. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Multimarginal flow matching with optimal transport potentials
item.description: Proposes flow matching with optimal transport potentials for multimodal dynamical systems, applied to scientific data. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: A prism hierarchy of learning regimes in large linear autoencoders
item.description: Theoretical study of learning regimes in linear autoencoders using loss expansion and gradient flow. (tags: foundations)

item.title: PJ-RoPE: A Fourier-Jet-Affine Position Space for Relative Attention
item.description: Mathematical formulation of relative positional encoding combining Fourier, jet, and affine structures for attention. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Learning Implicit Feasibility Constraints for Real-World Routing and Scheduling: Application to Log Transportation
item.description: Uses ML to learn feasibility constraints for routing and scheduling embedded in optimization. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Mamba-Assisted Non-Markovian Closure for Reduced-Order Modeling
item.description: Proposes Mamba-based non-Markovian closure model for reduced-order modeling of dynamical systems. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Generalized TV--$\ell_p$ Structured Priors for Bayesian $T_1$ Mapping
item.description: Introduces TV-ℓ_p structured priors for Bayesian T1 mapping with uncertainty quantification. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: LeanMarathon: Toward Reliable AI Co-Mathematicians through Long-Horizon Lean Autoformalization
item.description: Multi-agent system for autoformalization of research mathematics in Lean. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Harnessing Generalist Agents for Contextualized Time Series
item.description: LLM agent framework for time series analysis with tools; applied to scientific domains like energy and weather. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Full-Field Calibration of Coupled Thermomechanical Material Models at Finite Strain
item.description: Uses PDE-constrained optimization and adjoint sensitivity for full-field calibration of thermomechanical models. (tags: uq-inverse-problems, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: EpiEvolve: Self-Evolving Agents for Streaming Pandemic Forecasting under Regime Shifts
item.description: Self-evolving LLM agent for pandemic forecasting with regime shift adaptation. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Learning-Assisted Day-Ahead Energy Scheduling for Frequency-Secure Inverter-Dominated Grids with Grid-Forming Battery Energy Storage Systems
item.description: Learning-assisted surrogate model for frequency-secure energy scheduling in power grids. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Physics-Informed Graph Learning Acceleration for Large-Scale AC-OPF with Topology Changes
item.description: Uses physics-informed graph learning to accelerate AC-OPF, a scientific computing problem. (tags: physics-informed-ml, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Stochastic Multiscale Reconstruction of Lagrangian Turbulence via Guided Diffusion Models
item.description: Uses guided diffusion models for stochastic reconstruction of Lagrangian turbulence, a generative simulation method for a scientific computing problem. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: Towards stable and accurate electron dynamics via neural network based time-dependent variational Monte Carlo
item.description: Introduces neural network based time-dependent variational Monte Carlo for accurate electron dynamics, a scientific computing method. (tags: foundations)

item.title: High-Dimensional Theory of LoRA Fine-Tuning in a Solvable Attention Model
item.description: Develops a high-dimensional statistical theory of LoRA fine-tuning in attention models, a mathematical analysis. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: EML-CD: Causal Mechanism Recovery via EML Symbolic Trees in Structure Learning
item.description: Proposes a symbolic regression framework for causal mechanism recovery, aligning with equation discovery. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Dead Directions: Geometric Singular Learning
item.description: Geometric singular learning theory analysis of deep networks, including attention and modern architectures. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Diffusion Models for Adaptive Sequential Data Generation
item.description: Proposes a sequential diffusion model for adaptive time series generation with statistical guarantees, relevant to simulation. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: When Good Enough Is Optimal: Multiplication-Only Matrix Inversion Approximation for Quantized Gated DeltaNet
item.description: Proposes a fast matrix inversion approximation for linear attention, a numerical linear algebra optimization. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Learning solution operators of PDEs with sparse approximation methods
item.description: Uses sparse approximation methods to learn PDE solution operators, contributing to operator learning. (tags: operator-learning)

item.title: Integrating Mechanistic and Data-Driven Models for Neurological Disorders through Differentiable Programming
item.description: Hybrid physics-neural modeling with differentiable programming and neural ODEs for neurological modeling. (tags: differentiable-simulation, equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: A Microlocal Open-Boundary Method for Residual-Based Wave Solvers on Unbounded Domains
item.description: PINN-based wave solver with microlocal open-boundary method. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Where does Absolute Position come from in decoder-only Transformers?
item.description: Mathematical analysis of absolute position encoding in transformers. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: On the training of physics-informed neural operators for solving parametric partial differential equations
item.description: Study of training physics-informed neural operators for PDEs. (tags: operator-learning, physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Effective Dimensionality as an Operator Invariant for Physics-Preserving Constraint Adaptation in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: Effective dimensionality analysis and constraint adaptation for PINNs. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Diffusion Models Observe Only Gradients: A Geometric Perspective on Score Matching Errors
item.description: Geometric analysis of score matching errors in diffusion models, foundational theory. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Drag reduction or reward hacking? Recurrent multi-agent reinforcement learning that earns its reward
item.description: Uses differentiable projection and recurrent RL for drag reduction in turbulence, a scientific computing task. (tags: differentiable-simulation)

item.title: Tracing the Oracle: Improving Diffusion Timestep Scheduling for 3D CT Reconstruction
item.description: Proposes a diffusion-model timestep scheduling method for 3D CT reconstruction, an inverse problem. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Generative Criticality in Large Language Model Temperature Scaling
item.description: Applies a statistical-field framework to analyze LLM temperature scaling, a mathematical analysis of LLMs. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Error Analysis of Tr-PINNs Algorithm for 2D Incompressible Navier-Stokes Equations with Non-Homogeneous Boundary Conditions
item.description: Proposes an improved PINN method for Navier-Stokes equations with error analysis. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: PAC-Bayesian Adversarially Robust Generalization for Message Passing Graph Neural Networks: A Sensitivity Analysis
item.description: Provides a theoretical PAC-Bayesian generalization bound for GNNs, a mathematical analysis of neural networks. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Reactive Flux Matching: Mechanism Discovery and Adaptive Sampling of Rare Events
item.description: Introduces a flow-matching framework for discovering reaction pathways in molecular systems. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: Multi-ResNets for Subspace Preconditioning in Constrained Optimization
item.description: Proposes a neural network architecture for subspace preconditioning in constrained optimization. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Plug-and-Play Guidance for Discrete Diffusion Models via Gradient-Informed Logit Correction
item.description: Presents a guidance method for discrete diffusion models applied to molecular generation. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: Wall Shear Stress Reconstruction from Concentration: Differentiable Physics and Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: Compares differentiable physics and PINNs for wall shear stress reconstruction from scalar observations. (tags: differentiable-simulation, physics-informed-ml)

item.title: DAS-PINNs for high-dimensional partial differential equations: extending deep adaptive sampling to spacetime domains
item.description: Extends adaptive sampling PINNs to high-dimensional time-dependent PDEs. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Symmetric Divergence and Normalized Similarity: A Unified Topological Framework for Representation Analysis
item.description: Introduces a topological data analysis framework for comparing neural representations, including LLMs, constituting a mathematical analysis of deep learning models. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Function-Space Priors for Bayesian Neural ODEs with Application to Vessel Trajectory Prediction
item.description: Develops function-space priors for Bayesian Neural ODEs, advancing uncertainty quantification and dynamical system modeling. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems, uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Learned Response-Field Inertia Operator for HEC-RAS 2D Water-Surface Elevation Prediction
item.description: Introduces a learned surrogate model (LRFIO) for water-surface elevation prediction, accelerating a numerical simulator. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Bridging CAD and Data-Driven Design: Attributed Feature Graphs for Engineering Design
item.description: Proposes Attributed Feature Graphs and a GNN surrogate for engineering design, advancing surrogate modeling in scientific computing. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Goedel-Architect: Streamlining Formal Theorem Proving with Blueprint Generation and Refinement
item.description: Agentic framework for formal theorem proving in Lean, directly applying LLM agents to a scientific computing task. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: PC Layer: Polynomial Weight Preconditioning for Improving LLM Pre-Training
item.description: Proposes a polynomial preconditioning method for LLM training with theoretical convergence analysis, contributing to mathematical analysis of LLM optimization. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Learning and Inferring Multiphase Flow Dynamics in Porous Media using Scientific Machine Learning: Application to the "FluidFlower" CO2 Injection Experiment
item.description: Uses a CNN surrogate and Bayesian inference for multiphase flow in porous media, contributing to SciML methods for forward and inverse problems. (tags: ml-numerical-methods, uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Variational Inverse Problems for Second Order ODEs with and without Constraints
item.description: Addresses the inverse problem of finding Lagrangian descriptions from second-order ODEs with constraints, a foundational applied-math contribution. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Monte Carlo Steklov Operators for Large-Scale Geometry Processing in the Wild
item.description: Presents a Monte Carlo method for estimating Dirichlet-to-Neumann operators and Steklov eigenmodes, advancing numerical methods for geometry processing. (tags: ml-numerical-methods, foundations)

item.title: Uncovering Extreme Event Mechanisms for Prediction and Control with Sensitivity-Balanced Projections
item.description: Develops an interpretable technique using sensitivity-balanced projections to uncover mechanisms of extreme events in chaotic dynamical systems. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Diff2SP: Diffusion Models for Correlated Scenario Generation in Stochastic Programming
item.description: Introduces a diffusion-based framework for scenario generation in stochastic programming with theoretical regret bounds, combining generative models and optimization. (tags: generative-simulation, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Quantifying Uncertainty In Wide Two-Layer Neural Networks: On The Law Of The Limiting Fluctuation Process
item.description: Mathematical analysis (central limit theorem, PDE) of wide two-layer neural networks; in scope for the theoretical contribution. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: On statistical inference for non-linear dynamical systems evolving in their global attractor
item.description: Statistical inference for nonlinear dynamical systems on global attractors with recovery guarantees; relevant to inverse problems and uncertainty quantification. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)
